title: 10 best herbal tinctures for dysuria
description: Maidenhair tree tinctures helps with dysuria because of its unique composition, which is rich in flavonoids and saponins. These bioactive compounds have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms associated with urinary tract infections and irritation.
